decoration: moderate — a few SVG blobs or grid lines
hero_layout: centered — everything stacked in the middle
nav_style: minimal floating — small pill in corner
contact_style: split layout — message on left, links on right
footer_style: playful — with an emoji or easter egg
quirk: hero takes 100vh with centered huge typography
bonus_quirk: add a subtle scanline/CRT effect over the hero section
